title: Hello World
description: The obligatory first project. A simple interactive demo to test that the site is wired up correctly.
long_description: Every lab needs a starting point. This is it.

title: Topo Trail Map
description: Interactive topographic map with AI-generated trail condition reports.
long_description: Draw trails on a topo map, assign status (open/caution/closed/unmaintained), and click any trail to generate an AI condition report.
